reviews.comment:
Llegué una noche buscando algo de colaboración humana y recibí indiferencia .le pongo 2 estrellas xq quiero pensar que es falta de capacitación y no de corazón

(Translated by Google)
I arrived one night looking for some human support and was met with indifference. I'm giving it 2 stars because I want to believe it's due to a lack of training and not a lack of compassion.
